description: Zao Changpeng, founder of Binance, visits Uganda to discuss blockchain opportunities with President Yoweri Museveni and plans to establish Africa's largest cryptocurrency exchange in the country.
topic_summary: During a meeting with President Museveni [t=5:08], Zao Changpeng expressed intentions to set up a major cryptocurrency exchange in Uganda [t=38:13]. The initiative aims to enhance Uganda's economy and develop a talent pool for blockchain expertise [t=61:28].
